chapters.title: A Season of Healing
chapters.body: Before Eniolaoluwa and Tiwalade met, God was already at work. Having both come through difficult relationships, neither was actively searching for love. Instead, they embraced a season of healing, growth, and deeper trust in God. During this time, God gently prepared their hearts for a future they could not yet see - one that would eventually lead them to each other.

chapters.title: A Familiar Face at Church
chapters.body: Their story began long before their first conversation. Tiwalade first noticed Eniolaoluwa during a spoken word ministration in church. A month later, watching her confidently moderate a panel discussion only deepened his admiration. What seemed like ordinary moments of service became the beginning of an extraordinary story.

chapters.title: One Search on LinkedIn
chapters.body: After a mutual friend shared a group photograph from church on his WhatsApp status, curiosity led Tiwalade to search for Eniolaoluwa on LinkedIn. One profile visit became an evening of reading through her work and journey. Inspired by what he discovered, he decided to introduce himself.

chapters.title: The Message That Started It All
chapters.body: A simple WhatsApp message marked the beginning of everything. After discovering they lived close to each other, Tiwalade walked Eniolaoluwa home after Bible Study. After they parted, he said, "Let's do this again." Her response was simple: "Let's see how it goes 🤞🏾." Looking back, neither of them knew just how much those words would come to mean.

chapters.title: Growing Together
chapters.body: What began as a conversation soon became a meaningful friendship built on shared faith, purpose, and intentionality. As they journeyed together, Eniolaoluwa recognised, one by one, the very qualities God had placed on her heart during her season of waiting. With every step, both became increasingly certain that their story had always been part of God's beautiful plan.

chapters.title: The Easiest "Yes"
chapters.body: What was meant to be a birthday celebration with close friends became one of the most unforgettable days of their journey. In a moment filled with love, surprise, and answered prayers, Tiwalade asked the question that changed everything. Eniolaoluwa's answer was the easiest "Yes" she had ever spoken.

chapters.title: The Beginning of Forever
chapters.body: On Thursday, August 27, 2026, Eniolaoluwa and Tiwalade will stand before God and their loved ones to begin the next chapter of their story. With grateful hearts, they celebrate God's faithfulness, His perfect timing, and the beautiful journey that brought them here. They look forward to building a home founded on faith, love, and purpose - and are honoured to have you witness the beginning of forever.
